scenario_title: Treadmill task and excessive break requests
minimal_context: The student is expected to walk on the treadmill for two minutes during a one-on-one APE session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to walk on the treadmill for two minutes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Uses the break timer to request a break from instruction)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to do the treadmill first.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Requests another break, taking a 5-minute long break)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Your break is over. Please stand up and walk on the treadmill.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to walk on the treadmill for two minutes.

STUDENT: (Uses the break timer to request a break from instruction)

TUTOR: We need to do the treadmill first.

STUDENT: (Requests another break, taking a 5-minute long break)

TUTOR: Your break is over. Please stand up and walk on the treadmill.

STUDENT: (Lays on the floor screaming)

task.content: Walking on treadmill for two minutes

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During the thirty-minute session when expected to walk on the treadmill
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: literally laid on the floor screaming for the whole thirty minutes

behavior_patterns.condition: When using a break timer to request a break from instruction
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: use verbal or non-verbal communication to request a break... like eight times in a session and we get nothing done

behavior_patterns.condition: When taking breaks during the session
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: taking long breaks... each one is 5 minutes long
